item.name: Crescent Moon
item.description: With this dreamy magicked gondola, there is finally a moon that one can ask for─and sit on.

mount.name: Crescent Moon
mount.action: Summon forth your crescent moon mount. By all accounts more comfortable to perch upon than one shaped like a full moon.
mount.description: Designed in the likeness of a crescent moon, this magicked gondola was being kept in storage in Sharlayan, where it was classified as a gift. While its origin is undisclosed, the automaton that accompanies the contraption offers a telling clue.
mount.tooltip:
Gods, I can scarcely believe we
went to the moon and back...
- Thancred
